response.original_title: The Rhythm of Ancestors: Yoruba Bata
response.overview: In a world where tradition meets modernity, the Bata drum's sacred beat echoes across continents, carrying the spirit of Yoruba gods and the weight of history. As Afrobeats propels it into the global spotlight, a new generation grapples with its cultural identity. Will they reclaim their ancestral rhythm, or will it become a forgotten relic of the past?
response.title: The Rhythm of Ancestors: Yoruba Bata
